# AWS Infrastructure (Terraform)

Auto-generated Terraform configuration from existing AWS resources.

## Structure

- `ecs/` - ECS cluster, service, and task definitions
- `ec2_instance/` - EC2 instance for ECS container hosting
- `ecr/` - Elastic Container Registry for Docker images
- `iam/` - IAM roles and policies
- `sg/` - Security groups

## Generated Files

These files were generated using Terraformer from existing AWS infrastructure.
